[[Dimok (people)|Dimok]] forces used [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|''Assassin''-class corvette]] '''''Runka''''' during the [[Sepan Civil War]]. [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] encountered ''Runka'' near [[Sepan 8]] during the close of the [[Sepan campaign]]. Imperial Ace [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] discovered Imperial arms onboard, passing this information onto the [[Prophets of the Dark Side]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
